Home / Services / Luxury Pool Concierge

Luxury Pool Concierge

White-glove service for high-end residential properties.

For waterfront estates in Fisher Island and Star Island, our concierge service delivers discreet, comprehensive pool care with attention to elite client needs.

Staff are trained in luxury property protocols including noise restrictions, security coordination, and event prep. We maintain perfect water clarity for impromptu entertaining and use commercial-grade equipment scaled for oversized pools common in Palm Beach mansions.

Services include temperature pre-sets for arrivals, lighted fountain synchronization, and coordinating with landscape teams on water feature maintenance. All technicians undergo background checks and drive unmarked vehicles.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Customized service schedule planning
  2. 02 Step 2: Discreet equipment installation/maintenance
  3. 03 Step 3: Event preparation coordination
  4. 04 Step 4: Privacy-focused communications

Benefits

  • 24/7 emergency response
  • Staff familiar with luxury property protocols
  • Commercial-grade equipment for large volumes
  • Complete discretion

Frequently Asked Questions

Do you service infinity edge pools?

Our team specializes in vanishing edge systems common in Key Biscayne cliffside homes, with specific training on balancing pumps for consistent sheeting flow.

Can you integrate with smart home systems?

We regularly sync with Control4, Crestron, and Savant systems for remote monitoring and control of temperature, lighting, and water features.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with luxury pool concierge? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: 555-poo-r91
